flags.summary: In-state tuition at Willamette University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.2k → $51.2k).

flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Willamette University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.2k → $51.2k).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Willamette University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Willamette University are 46% above 6-year earnings ($38.9k → $56.9k).
